option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# LM-Source Product Development Plan (v1.1)
## 1. Vision & Goals - Deliver a lightweight browser extension for Chrome & Edge that enhances LLM chat experiences on Claude.ai and ChatGPT. - Core objectives: enable message pinning, deletion, editing, highlighting, and zero‑loss context handoff when token limits are reached.
## 2. Scope (v1.0 Non‑Goals) - Native mobile support, Firefox/Safari, cloud sync, multi‑platform LLM support (deferred to v2.0).
## 3. Feature Set (v1.1 MVP) | ID | Feature | Description | Priority | |----|---------|-------------|----------| | F‑01 | Context Extraction | Auto‑extract structured context (summary, decisions, code, next steps) when token limit is hit. | P0 | | F‑02 | Pin Messages | Save any message to a persistent pinboard. | P0 | | F‑03 | Delete Messages | Soft‑delete/hide messages from view. | P0 | | F‑04 | Edit AI Responses | Inline edit of AI‑generated messages, saved locally with [Edited] tag. | P1 | | F‑05 | Highlight Text | Colour‑code text snippets (yellow, green, red). | P1 | | F‑06 | Context Handoff (NEW) | Package extracted context into a handoff prompt; deliver via new tab, clipboard, or pinboard. | P0 |
## 4. Technical Requirements - **Manifest**: MV3, target Chrome 120+ & Edge 120+. - **Storage**: chrome.storage.local for pins, highlights, edits, deleted‑message state, handoff prompts (<2 MB). - **Content Scripts**: Injected on claude.ai/* and chat.openai.com/*; abstracted platform adapters. - **DOM Observation**: MutationObserver to detect dynamic messages and token‑limit banners. - **Permissions**: activeTab, storage, scripting, clipboardWrite, host_permissions (claude.ai, chat.openai.com).
## 5. Development Phases & Milestones | Phase | Duration | Key Deliverables | |-------|----------|------------------| | **Phase 1 – Foundation** | Weeks 1‑2 | MV3 scaffold, platform adapters, basic storage, CI for DOM‑change monitoring. | | **Phase 2 – Core Features** | Weeks 3‑4 | Implement F‑01, F‑02, F‑03; UI for pinboard & delete; internal alpha testing. | | **Phase 3 – Enhanced Features** | Weeks 5‑6 | Add F‑04 (edit), F‑05 (highlight), Edge compatibility, popup UI. | | **Phase 4 – Context Handoff (F‑06)** | Weeks 7‑8 | Token‑limit detection, context‑extraction engine, handoff prompt builder, 3 delivery options. | | **Phase 5 – MVP Launch** | Weeks 9‑10 | Beta testing, bug fixes, Chrome Web Store & Edge Add‑ons submission. |
## 6. User Experience (UX) Flow 1. **Detection** – Extension watches for token‑limit banner or error message. 2. **Prompt** – Non‑intrusive banner appears with three buttons: *Open New Tab*, *Copy to Clipboard*, *Save to Pinboard*. 3. **Delivery** – User selects an option; new tab opens (if chosen) and the handoff prompt is auto‑injected. 4. **Continuation** – User sends the prompt, chat resumes with full context.
## 7. Risks & Mitigations | Risk | Impact | Mitigation | |------|--------|------------| | DOM changes on Claude/ChatGPT break selectors | High | Abstract selectors behind platform adapter; monitor changes in CI. | | Auto‑handoff fails for very long sessions | Medium | Progressive summarisation; fallback to manual trigger. | | MV3 API limits background tasks | Medium | Design all features within MV3 constraints from day 1. | | Store‑rejection due to privacy policy | Medium | Prepare detailed privacy documentation; all processing stays client‑side. | | User data privacy concerns | High | No data leaves the browser; clear privacy policy; local‑only storage. |
## 8. Success Metrics (MVP) - 500+ installs within 30 days of store release. - ≥ 4.0 average rating. - ≤ 2 % uninstall rate after 7 days. - Core features functional on both platforms; ≤ 5 % of handoff prompts require manual editing.
## 9. Future Scope (v2.0+) - Encrypted cross‑device sync. - Export to Notion, Obsidian, Google Docs, Markdown. - Support for additional LLM platforms (Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, local Ollama models). - Collaborative annotation & shared pinboards.
---
*Document generated from LM‑Source PRD v1.1 (June 2026).*
